summary: Added contextual empty states for dashboard, budgets, goals pages with shared EmptyState component (#263).
Graceful session expiry: alert instead of silent redirect, form draft saved to MMKV, auto-restore after re-login (#359). 22 tests.
Spending trends #267: TrendsChart already existed, added encouraging message for <2 months of data. PR #268 merged.
CRA to Vite migration #194: build time 72s→1s, removed react-scripts, updated all env vars REACT_APP_*→VITE_*. PR #269 merged.
Multi-currency support #158: ExchangeRate model, frankfurter.app integration, baseCurrency on User, currency on Expense, report conversion. 28 tests. PR #159 merged.

Added ExchangeRate MongoDB model, frankfurter.app exchange rate caching (6hr TTL), convertCurrency helper, PATCH /api/users/profile for baseCurrency, expense currency defaulting to baseCurrency, report endpoints converting to baseCurrency. 28 new tests. PR #159.
Multi-currency UI #266: already implemented — currency picker in modals, display conversion, settings picker. Closed as done.

Smart push notifications #362: backend infra (budgetAlertPush, weeklySummaryPush, unusualSpendingPush, notifications route) + mobile (onboarding opt-in, settings toggles, push token registration). Backend PR #161, Mobile PR #363 merged.
App Store submission prep #14/#154: EAS production config, CI workflow, store metadata, submission runbook. PR #364 merged. Manual steps remain (account setup).
Code splitting #67: lazy load routes+tabs+vendor chunks. Initial load 360KB→100KB gzipped (3.6x smaller). PR #270 merged.
Keyboard shortcuts + a11y #392: Ctrl/Cmd+Enter (autofill), Ctrl/Cmd+E (export), Enter/Escape (accept/reject), Arrow keys (guided nav), ? help overlay, ARIA improvements. PR #395 merged.
Autofill quality rating #383: thumbs up/down widget in confidence banner, AutofillRating model, POST API endpoint, 30s auto-dismiss, Pro nudge on low scores. PR #396 merged.

Tag model (name, color, owner), POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/tags, tags field on Expense, ?tag filter on GET /api/expenses, tag management on PUT /api/expenses/:id. Max 50 tags/user, 10/transaction, case-insensitive uniqueness. 35 tests. PR #163.
Send by email #382: added email format to export modal with inline To/Subject/Message form, Pro gate, auto-fetch user email. PR #397 merged.
Transaction tagging API #162: Tag model, CRUD routes, expense tag filter, 35 tests. PR #163 merged.

MonthlyReportPage: month picker, income/expenses/net cards, category pie chart, top-5 MoM chips, budget vs actual, PDF print export, empty state, 9 unit tests. Reports tab added to desktop sidebar + mobile bottom nav. Lazy-loaded chunk 14.6kB. PR #273 merged.

TestFlight prep #22: eas.json submit config with env-var Apple credentials, prebuild-check script, TESTFLIGHT-RUNBOOK.md. All pre-flight checks pass (tsc clean, 116 tests, no dev URLs). Blocked on Ricky running interactive eas build with Apple creds.

Streak widget + daily reminder #84: StreakWidget component on home screen (current/best streak, fire/sleep emoji, motivational zero-state), daily local notification via expo-notifications with configurable time in Settings. 12 new tests (128 total). PR #87 merged.
Pose confidence indicator #80: per-frame exercise-specific landmark confidence, amber/red warning banners, rep-count pause on critical, 2s warm-up grace. 10 new tests (138 total). PR #89 merged.
Shareable summary card #83: ShareCard component + react-native-view-shot capture + expo-sharing, PB badge, Share button on Summary. PR #90 merged.
Form trends chart #85: daily score line chart on History with exercise filter + 4/8/12w range. react-native-chart-kit + trendData.ts. 7 new tests (145 total). PR #91 merged.
Bench press exercise #79: formAnalysis/benchPress.ts with bar path drift, elbow flare, uneven press, insufficient depth flags. 15 new tests. Background worker PR #88 merged + integration fix PR #92.
Backend #1 done: Express+TS+MongoDB scaffold, GET /health 200, PR #14 open
Backend #2 done: JWT auth, register+login endpoints, PR #15 open
Backend #16 done: Google SSO via id_token, PR #19 open

MVP backend complete: auth, health profile, cabinet, AI chat, interactions, history, i18n, smart model routing. Web complete: auth, dashboard, profile, cabinet, chat, history, i18n EN/廣東話/繁中, extraction toast. Railway + Vercel configs added. All PRs merged to main.

MVP complete. Backend: 32 PRs merged (auth, profile, cabinet, chat, interactions, history, i18n, model routing, extraction review). Web: 23 PRs (auth, dashboard, profile, cabinet, chat, history, i18n EN/廣東話/繁中, extraction toast, Google SSO fix). CI green on both repos.
feat: load conversation history when selecting past conversation — GET /chat/:id API + frontend handleSelectConversation rewrite

Implemented Phase 2 features: Proactive Insights (AI chat system prompt), insight styling in MessageBubble (💡 prefix detection), weight trend backend endpoint (GET /profile/weight-trend with changeHistory logging for AI extractions), and SVG sparkline chart on profile page
Phase 2 continued: meal suggestions endpoint (GET /chat/meal-suggestions via Gemini), frontend meal card component on dashboard, supplement schedule grouped view on dashboard
Phase 2 batch 2: gym nutrition endpoint + dashboard card (food/supplement protocol), deployed backend to Fly.io
Budget tracker: price/currency fields on CabinetItem, budget-summary endpoint, monthly cost form field, emerald banner on cabinet page. Backend deployed to Fly.io.
Data Export: AI-generated health summary report via GET /profile/export-report, export modal on profile page with copy + .txt download
Stack Sharing: SharedStack model, POST /cabinet/share, public GET /cabinet/shared/:token, Share Stack button on cabinet page, public /shared-stack/:token page with CTA
Bloodwork profile section (backend+frontend), fixed PATCH->PUT profile bug, OCR label scan via Gemini Vision (backend+frontend)
Family Profiles: FamilyMember model, ?memberId scoping on profile/cabinet, switcher UI, member management modal
Deal finder UI: Find Deals button + collapsible panel in cabinet showing AI buying tips per supplement (platform badge + tips text). Closed #54, marked Supplement 特價 Checker as Done on board.

Schedule API+UI: GET /cabinet/schedule endpoint + /schedule page with time-slot cards. Dark mode persistence with ThemeProvider+ThemeToggle. Wellness score API (Gemini-based scoring). Onboarding checklist. All closed/merged.

Added stack-builder and seasonal-recommendations endpoints to backend (POST /cabinet/stack-builder, GET /cabinet/seasonal-recommendations). Built Stack Builder UI page at /stack-builder with grouped priority cards, inline add-to-cabinet. Added to Dashboard quick actions.

Added restock-alerts endpoint + quantity tracking fields to CabinetItem. Also completed Quick Scan UI (mobile camera capture + 10MB check). Background agent completed AI Timing Optimizer (GET /cabinet/schedule/optimized).
Added restock tracking fields to CabinetItemModal (qty remaining, daily doses, threshold) and amber low-supply badge on cabinet cards.
Added seasonal recommendations collapsible card to stack-builder page (GET /cabinet/seasonal-recommendations).
Completed: bloodwork endpoints, AI context enrichment in chat, intake streak API, user settings API, journal trends chart, streak tracker UI. All deployed to recallth-backend.fly.dev.
AI chat auto-title+summary: added summary field to Conversation schema, async Gemini title generation after first exchange, GET /chat/history returns summary. PR#94 merged.
GET /cabinet/redundancies: AI supplement redundancy detector with Gemini, 1h in-memory cache per user, bust on cabinet writes. PR#95 merged.
Redundancy detector UI panel on cabinet page. Fetches GET /cabinet/redundancies, collapsible panel, risk badges (low/moderate/high), cache bust on mutations. PR#139 merged.

prompt: i18n: translate hardcoded English nav labels across 9 pages
summary: Updated 9 pages to use t(labelKey) via useT() hook, added missing nav keys to all 3 locale files, created AppNav shared component

prompt: Add PRODUCT.md documenting all 14 features with acceptance criteria
summary: Created PRODUCT.md at repo root covering all pages: auth, dashboard, cabinet, schedule, chat, history, journal, bloodwork, side-effects, doctor-prep, stack-builder, profile, notifications, onboarding

prompt: i18n cabinet page — translate all hardcoded English strings
summary: Added ~45 new cabinet locale keys to en/zh-HK/zh-TW, updated cabinet/page.tsx with t() calls covering ~60 strings, removed unused frequency/timing helpers

prompt: fix chat extraction shape mismatch — ExtractionToast never showed
summary: Backend: toFrontendExtraction() maps ExtractionResult to {profile, cabinet} shape. Frontend: re-fetch profile after extraction so AI context panel updates
